evals.prompt: Set up PostHog analytics for our Next.js SaaS app. Track: page views, button clicks, sign-up funnel (landing → register → onboard → first project), and feature usage (which features users engage with). Include consent management for GDPR.
evals.expected_output: PostHog integration with event tracking, funnel definition, consent banner, and server-side tracking

assertions.name: posthog_integration
assertions.description: PostHog SDK initialized in the Next.js app

assertions.name: event_tracking
assertions.description: Custom events defined for sign-up funnel steps

assertions.name: consent_management
assertions.description: Cookie consent banner with opt-in/opt-out

assertions.name: funnel_definition
assertions.description: Sign-up funnel steps defined for analytics

assertions.name: server_side
assertions.description: Server-side event tracking from NestJS backend

evals.prompt: Add event tracking architecture for our mobile Flutter app. Define events for: user registration, item purchase, search queries, and screen views. Use a typed event system that prevents typos in event names.
evals.expected_output: Typed analytics event system with enum-based event names and properties

assertions.name: typed_events
assertions.description: Events defined as enums or typed constants, not raw strings

assertions.name: event_properties
assertions.description: Each event has typed properties (not untyped maps)

assertions.name: key_events_covered
assertions.description: Registration, purchase, search, and screen view events defined

assertions.name: analytics_service
assertions.description: Centralized analytics service for sending events

assertions.name: privacy_controls
assertions.description: Opt-out or disable tracking capability

evals.prompt: Set up a product analytics dashboard showing: DAU/MAU ratio, feature adoption rates, user retention cohorts, and conversion funnel. Use PostHog or equivalent.
evals.expected_output: Dashboard configuration with key metrics, cohort analysis, and funnel visualization

assertions.name: dau_mau
assertions.description: DAU/MAU stickiness ratio tracked

assertions.name: feature_adoption
assertions.description: Per-feature usage rates defined

assertions.name: retention_cohorts
assertions.description: User retention cohort analysis configured

assertions.name: conversion_funnel
assertions.description: Multi-step conversion funnel defined

assertions.name: dashboard_layout
assertions.description: Dashboard with organized panels for each metric

evals.prompt: Implement server-side event tracking from our NestJS API. Track: API endpoint usage, error rates by endpoint, user actions (create, update, delete by entity type), and external service call latency.
evals.expected_output: NestJS middleware or interceptor for server-side analytics tracking

assertions.name: endpoint_tracking
assertions.description: Tracks API endpoint usage with method and path

assertions.name: error_tracking
assertions.description: Tracks error rates per endpoint

assertions.name: user_action_events
assertions.description: Tracks CRUD actions by entity type and user

assertions.name: external_latency
assertions.description: Tracks response time of external service calls

assertions.name: no_pii_in_events
assertions.description: Events do not contain PII (no email, password, etc.)

evals.prompt: Add A/B testing capability to our React app. We want to test: landing page hero text (3 variants), pricing page layout (2 variants), and onboarding flow length (3 steps vs 5 steps). Track conversion per variant.
evals.expected_output: A/B test setup with variant assignment, persistence, and conversion tracking

assertions.name: variant_assignment
assertions.description: Users assigned to variants consistently (session or user-based)

assertions.name: three_experiments
assertions.description: All 3 experiments configured with their variants

assertions.name: conversion_tracking
assertions.description: Conversion events tracked per variant

assertions.name: persistent_assignment
assertions.description: User sees same variant across sessions

assertions.name: statistical_guidance
assertions.description: Guidance on sample size or statistical significance
